summary: Frontend testing complete for 99-style homepage redesign. All features verified: floating pill-shaped bottom nav, 'Para onde vamos?' search, promo banner, 4 tabs (Mobilidade/Lojas/Serviços/Carteira), header with Pix/notification/menu. Removed features (Proteção/Saúde/Internet/Telemedicina) not visible.

issues: User greeting shows 'Olá, Usuário!' instead of actual user name - displayName logic may need review

critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.js line 41: displayName fallback shows 'Usuário' when user.nome_fantasia/company_name/full_name are null - working as designed but user greeting shows generic name
Bottom nav correctly implements 99-style: rounded-full (9999px), fixed position, bottom: 16px (4 in tailwind), shadow-2xl
All 4 tabs working: Mobilidade (Car icon), Lojas (Utensils icon), Serviços (Package icon), Carteira (DollarSign icon)
Profile menu correctly shows Perfil, Painel Admin, Sair options
context_for_next_testing_agent: 99-style homepage redesign verified. All features working: floating pill-shaped bottom nav with 4 tabs, 'Para onde vamos?' search button, promo banner carousel, stores preview section, header with Pix/notification/menu. Removed features not visible on page.

frontend_tests.description: 'Para onde vamos?' button found with correct testid
Floating pill-shaped nav with shadow (rounded-full, fixed, bottom:14px)
Header with greeting, Pix button, notification bell, menu
Menu shows Perfil, Painel Admin, Sair
Proteção, Saúde, Internet, Telemedicina not visible
Lojas tab shows store grid with category filters
Carteira tab shows balance card, deposit/withdraw buttons

features_verified.homepage_layout: PASS - 99-style with map, search, banner, stores preview
features_verified.removed_features_hidden: PASS - Proteção, Saúde, Internet, Telemedicina not visible
